options.name: --reset

before running batch file commands

options.name: --seconds-per-block
options.description:
Time between blocks
Default value is: 0.

options.name: --witness-scope
options.description:
Witness Scope to use for transaction
signer (Default: CalledByEntry)
Allowed values are: None, CalledByEntry,
Global.
Default value is: CalledByEntry.

operation

conflict

arguments.name: ACCOUNT

options.name: --height
options.description:
Block height to get contract state for
Zero gets the latest
Default value is: 0.

options.name: --force
options.description:
Replace contract and storage if it already exists
Defaults to None if option unspecified, All if option
value unspecified
Allowed values are: None, All, ContractOnly,
StorageOnly.

arguments.name: RPCURI
arguments.description:
URL of Neo JSON-RPC Node
Specify MainNet (default), TestNet or JSON-RPC URL

arguments.name: ACCOUNT
arguments.description: Account that would deploy the contract

options.description:
Witness Scope to use for transaction
signer (Default: CalledByEntry)
Allowed values are: None, CalledByEntry,
Global.
Default value is: CalledByEntry.

GAS)

options.description:
Additional GAS to apply to the contract
invocation
Default value is: 0.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Name of .neo-express file to create
Default location is home directory as:
Linux:
$HOME/.neo-express/default.neo-express
Windows:
%UserProfile%\.neo-express\default.neo-express

options.name: --count
options.description:
Number of consensus nodes to create
(Default: 1)
Allowed values are: 1, 4, 7.
Default value is: 1.

options.name: --address-version
options.description:
Version to use for addresses in this
blockchain instance (Default: 53)

options.name: --private-key
options.description:
Private key for default dev account
(Format: HEX or WIF)
Default: Random

options.name: --batch-filename
options.description:
Use a batch file to initialize the
blockchain after creation.

options.name: --account
options.description: Account to pay invocation GAS fee

options.name: --witness-scope
options.description:
Witness Scope for transaction signer(s)
(Allowed: None, CalledByEntry, Global)
Allowed values are: None, CalledByEntry,
Global.
Default value is: CalledByEntry.

options.name: --results
options.description:
Invoke contract for results (does not cost
GAS)

options.name: --gas
options.description:
Additional GAS to apply to the contract
invocation
Default value is: 0.

arguments.name: POLICY
arguments.description:
Policy to set
Allowed values are: GasPerBlock,
MinimumDeploymentFee, CandidateRegistrationFee,
OracleRequestFee, NetworkFeePerByte,
StorageFeeFactor, ExecutionFeeFactor.
Default value is: GasPerBlock.

arguments.name: VALUE
arguments.description:
New Policy Value
Default value is: 0.

arguments.description: Account to pay contract invocation GAS fee

arguments.name: SOURCE
arguments.description:
Source of policy values. Must be local policy
settings JSON file or the URL of Neo JSON-RPC Node
For Node URL,"MainNet" or "TestNet" can be specified
in addition to a standard HTTP URL
